title: Neo-Noir
description: A collective dedicated to the dark, high-contrast visual language of modern noir. Deep shadows, neon highlights, and moral ambiguity.
themeLine: Where the shadows find their light.
tickerText: THE NOIR RITUAL IS LIVE — SUBMIT YOUR EDITS NOW

title: Epic Builders
description: Creators of grand-scale cinematic moments. If it feels like a legend, it belongs here.
tickerText: THE MYTHOS FESTIVAL IS LIVE — COME CREATE

title: Raw Grit
description: Unfiltered, intense, and uncompromising visuals. Inspired by the mines of KGF and the streets of Vikram.
